blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 19 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,695 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 3.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 31.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 20" over the past week. Current depth: 53".
